name: Nitin Sharma
title: AI Engineer

about.summary: AI Engineer with 1+ year of experience building production-grade AI agents, LLM-powered applications, and multi-agent systems. Skilled in agentic AI frameworks, RAG pipelines, and LLM orchestration.

stats.label: Reduction in analyst requests at Sonar
Annual savings from replacing paid chatbot
Less manual effort via voice AI assistant

services.name: AI Agent Development
services.description: Custom autonomous agents that reason, plan, and act across tools, APIs, and databases. Multi-agent architectures for complex workflows.

services.name: RAG & Knowledge Systems
services.description: Connect your LLM to your data. Document Q&A, enterprise knowledge bases, semantic search over structured and unstructured data.

services.name: Voice AI Assistants
services.description: Conversational voice agents for booking, support, and automation. Real-time speech recognition, natural TTS, telephony integration.

services.name: LLM Backend Engineering
services.description: Production APIs and microservices for AI features. FastAPI or .NET backends, Docker deployments, clean architecture.

services.name: AI Chatbots & Support Automation
services.description: Replace expensive SaaS tools with purpose-built chatbots trained on your data. Better answers, lower cost, full control.

services.name: BI & Dashboard Automation
services.description: Natural language to dashboard. Let your team ask questions and see live data — no SQL, no BI analyst required for routine queries.

projects.name: Advisor AI — Multi-Agent Financial Intelligence
projects.description: A multi-agent system built with Microsoft Agent Framework and ASP.NET Core. Powers financial advisors with AI-generated portfolio insights and lets end clients self-serve personalised financial analysis.
projects.impact: Eliminated manual reporting overhead across two business channels.

projects.name: Natural Language BI Agent
projects.description: Agno-based AI that gives business leaders instant dashboards from natural language — handling 3× more question types than typical BI tools with live data.

projects.name: Voice AI Booking Assistant
projects.description: Real-time voice agent using Pipecat, Whisper, ElevenLabs and Twilio WebRTC. Automates bookings via natural conversation, sends instant confirmations.
projects.impact: 50% reduction in manual effort. Increased revenue by reducing missed bookings.

projects.name: LLM Customer Support Chatbot
projects.description: Custom chatbot using LangChain and RAG, containerized with Docker. Replaced a paid third-party support service.
projects.impact: Replaced a ₹10L/year service. Better query handling, full data control.

projects.name: HR Agent — Employee Management Bot
projects.description: Conversational HR agent using LangGraph and LangChain. Employees can apply for leave and view profiles through natural chat.

bullets: Building Advisor AI — a multi-agent financial intelligence system using Microsoft Agent Framework, ASP.NET Core, RAG, Plugins, and MCP.
Powers two channels: advisors get AI-generated portfolio insights; end clients self-serve personalised financial analysis.
Eliminated manual reporting overhead that previously required significant analyst time before every client conversation.
Built an Agno-based AI agent for natural-language BI, handling 3× more question types than standard BI tools and reducing analyst requests by ~70%.
Developed a voice-based AI assistant using Pipecat, Whisper, ElevenLabs and Twilio — cutting manual booking effort by 50% and increasing revenue.
Replaced a ₹10L/year paid support chatbot with an in-house LangChain + RAG solution with better accuracy and full data ownership.
Coordinated a 5-member external team for the Point Engineer Limousine Pre-Allocation System — owned requirements, progress tracking, and end-to-end technical delivery.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Engineering (Data Science)
education.university: J.C. Bose University of Science and Technology, YMCA

achievements: Data Science & GenAI (Coursera) — Certificate of Excellence, 92.50%
Coordinated 5-member external team, owned end-to-end technical delivery
